name: Succubus Juice
descrip: A specially made, demonically infused cocktail that lowers your Arousal by [ItemArousal], restores [ItemEnergy] Energy, and amps up your Allure by 10 for 15 turns... while also irresistibly Charming you for the same duration.♥ {size=-15}Does not contain real succubus juice.{/size}
useOutcome: |f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|Charm15|n||f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|SuccJuiceBuff|n|[AttackerName] downs the vial's fruity punch-tasting contents, and feels a sudden, intoxicating rush of heart-racing sexual desire alongside an invigorating thrum of sensual confidence!
